step_rationale: GPVI signaling transducer; downstream phosphorylation in collagen-triggered platelet activation.
mechanism: Syk tyrosine kinase transduces GPVI-collagen signaling driving platelet activation and adhesion.

references.title: Mucor circinelloides induces platelet aggregation through integrin αIIbβ3 and FcγRIIA.
NLRP3 regulates platelet integrin αIIbβ3 outside-in signaling, hemostasis and arterial thrombosis.
Gintonin modulates platelet function and inhibits thrombus formation via impaired glycoprotein VI signaling.
Plant-based Food Cyanidin-3-Glucoside Modulates Human Platelet Glycoprotein VI Signaling and Inhibits Platelet Activation and Thrombus Formation.
